scope: governed champion_hand promotion, production crop drafting, serving, and cache lifecycle

class_contract.registry: promotion accepts exactly this vocabulary and explicitly recognizes the boundary band
class_contract.serving: production MMSeg loader accepts the same exact vocabulary and returns the boundary mask by name

production_path.crop: one governed 1.6x square 1024-pixel crop for each visible hand side
production_path.prediction: unique verified champion_hand MMSeg slot, loaded and closed once per crop
production_path.paste_back: nearest-neighbor crop_to_full_transform reprojection through the lane common contract
production_path.outputs: hand base, visible finger masks, and finger_occlusion_boundary
production_path.authority: champion replaces steps 2.3-2.4 as crop drafter; SAM2 remains interactive_editor_only

cache_lifecycle.replacement: model, checkpoint, config, or vocabulary change forces S07
cache_lifecycle.rollback: role removal forces S07 and removes champion artifacts through atomic stage replacement
cache_lifecycle.selection_scope: S07 is forced only for runs whose selected stages include S07

current_live_registry.interpretation: the existing S07/SAM2 fallback remains unchanged until a D7 winner is promoted

remaining_gate: MF-P5-05.05 remains partially complete because no D7-winning checkpoint exists and therefore no real winner output has yet passed the required QC-018 paste-back >= 0.995 measurement.
